'''âth-d-sh''' ('''kathadash''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:staddle|staddle]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-d-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:staddle|staddle]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âth-d-sh
|-
! Lemma
| kathadash
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thithadash|thithadash]] || [[word:jithadash|jithadash]] || [[word:shithadash|shithadash]] || [[word:kithadash|kithadash]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuthadash|thuthuthadash]] || [[word:jujuthadash|jujuthadash]] || [[word:shushuthadash|shushuthadash]] || [[word:kukuthadash|kukuthadash]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuthadash|thuthadash]] || [[word:juthadash|juthadash]] || [[word:shuthadash|shuthadash]] || [[word:kuthadash|kuthadash]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuthadash|thuthadash]] || [[word:juthadash|juthadash]] || [[word:shuthadash|shuthadash]] || [[word:kuthadash|kuthadash]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thethadash|thethadash]] || [[word:jethadash|jethadash]] || [[word:shethadash|shethadash]] || [[word:kethadash|kethadash]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothothadash|thothothadash]] || [[word:jojothadash|jojothadash]] || [[word:shoshothadash|shoshothadash]] || [[word:kokothadash|kokothadash]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thothadash|thothadash]] || [[word:jothadash|jothadash]] || [[word:shothadash|shothadash]] || [[word:kothadash|kothadash]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thothadash|thothadash]] || [[word:jothadash|jothadash]] || [[word:shothadash|shothadash]] || [[word:kothadash|kothadash]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠthadash|thĂŠthadash]] || [[word:jĂŠthadash|jĂŠthadash]] || [[word:shĂŠthadash|shĂŠthadash]] || [[word:kĂŠthadash|kĂŠthadash]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathathadash|thathathadash]] || [[word:jajathadash|jajathadash]] || [[word:shashathadash|shashathadash]] || [[word:kakathadash|kakathadash]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thathadash|thathadash]] || [[word:jathadash|jathadash]] || [[word:shathadash|shathadash]] || [[word:kathadash|kathadash]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thathadash|thathadash]] || [[word:jathadash|jathadash]] || [[word:shathadash|shathadash]] || [[word:kathadash|kathadash]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shathadash|shathadash]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshathadash|goshathadash]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishathadash|gokishathadash]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shathadashnĂŒ|shathadashnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshathadashnknĂŒ|goshathadashnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishathadashnĂŒ|gokishathadashnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shathadashĂ«|shathadashĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshathadashnkshĂ«|goshathadashnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishathadashĂ«|gokishathadashĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shathadashro|shathadashro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshathadashnkro|goshathadashnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishathadashro|gokishathadashro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shathadashmu|shathadashmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshathadashnkmu|goshathadashnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishathadashmu|gokishathadashmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shathadasher|shathadasher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshathadashnksher|goshathadashnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishathadasher|gokishathadasher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shathadashng|shathadashng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshathadashnkng|goshathadashnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishathadashng|gokishathadashng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shathadashya|shathadashya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshathadashnkya|goshathadashnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishathadashya|gokishathadashya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shathadashyam|shathadashyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshathadashnkyam|goshathadashnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishathadashyam|gokishathadashyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shathadashnĂŒshĂ«|shathadashnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshathadashnknĂŒshĂ«|goshathadashnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishathadashnĂŒshĂ«|gokishathadashnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shathadashnĂŒro|shathadashnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshathadashnknĂŒro|goshathadashnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishathadashnĂŒro|gokishathadashnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shathadashnĂŒmu|shathadashnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshathadashnknĂŒmu|goshathadashnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishathadashnĂŒmu|gokishathadashnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shathadashĂ«nĂŒ|shathadashĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshathadashnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshathadashnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishathadashĂ«nĂŒ|gokishathadashĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shathadashĂ«ro|shathadashĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshathadashnkshĂ«ro|goshathadashnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishathadashĂ«ro|gokishathadashĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shathadashĂ«mu|shathadashĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshathadashnkshĂ«mu|goshathadashnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishathadashĂ«mu|gokishathadashĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shathadashronĂŒ|shathadashronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshathadashnkronĂŒ|goshathadashnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishathadashronĂŒ|gokishathadashronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shathadashroshĂ«|shathadashroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshathadashnkroshĂ«|goshathadashnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishathadashroshĂ«|gokishathadashroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shathadashromu|shathadashromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshathadashnkromu|goshathadashnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishathadashromu|gokishathadashromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shathadashmunĂŒ|shathadashmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshathadashnkmunĂŒ|goshathadashnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishathadashmunĂŒ|gokishathadashmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shathadashmushĂ«|shathadashmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshathadashnkmushĂ«|goshathadashnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishathadashmushĂ«|gokishathadashmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shathadashmuro|shathadashmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshathadashnkmuro|goshathadashnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishathadashmuro|gokishathadashmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|dcef9d8}}
